Identity

Artist. Architect.
Obsessive.

Working at the intersection of generative AI, dark surrealist aesthetics, electronic music, and enterprise design systems.

The Practice

TØX!Q is the creative identity of Justin Dilbeck — artist, producer, and UX practitioner working at the intersection of generative AI, dark surrealist aesthetics, electronic music, and enterprise design systems.

By day, Justin operates at the enterprise level — leading UX and information architecture for Fortune 100 technology clients, building WCAG-compliant design systems, and restructuring large-scale navigation architectures.

By night, and in between, everything feeds into a single creative engine: AI, art, sound, and code.

Disciplines

  • 01

    AI Art

    Midjourney · Stable Diffusion · Kling · Veo · Sora · Wan

  • 02

    Music Production

    Drum & Bass · Neurofunk · Deep House · Dubstep

  • 03

    UX / Information Architecture

    Enterprise navigation · Design systems · Accessibility · Front-end

  • 04

    Creative Tooling

    Browser apps · n8n automation · AI content pipelines · Claude API

Dark, baroque, deliberate. Imagery favors locked compositions. Music favors pressure over melody. Design favors structure over decoration.

The TØX!Q work is defined by a consistent aesthetic across every medium. Each piece begins with observation — a quality of light through glass, a texture remembered in childhood, a feeling without a name.

The studio is a laboratory where intuition and technique negotiate in the dark. Animation work uses a consistent framework: baroque detail protection, no camera drift, atmospheric breath rather than motion.

Models are chosen per-image — Kling for fluid organic motion, Veo for painterly fidelity, Sora for dimensional depth, Wan for textural transformation.

Capabilities

IA

Information Architecture

Card sorting · Sitemaps · Content taxonomies · Navigation systems

SYS

Design Systems

Component libraries · Token systems · Pattern documentation

A11Y

Accessibility

WCAG AA/AAA · ADA component systems · Inclusive design

DEV

Front-End

Astro · TypeScript · Vanilla CSS · Dark UI · Responsive layouts

AI

AI Tooling

n8n automation · Multi-agent workflows · Claude API · Midjourney

PRO

Prototyping

Interactive prototypes · Stakeholder documentation · Figma MCP
